wikitext:
[]: Eva 3.0 (Q) Trailers Thread (PRE-11/17 ONLY)             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Oct 22, 2012 10:55 am Okay, let's try this again, since the last thread ended up all over the place. Newest trailers so far: Nico Nico trailer: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oShhpls3dqs Santen (eyedrop merchandise/promo) trailer: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5f2z7OKH5sQ If any new trailers show up, post and discuss them here. If you have something in particular to discuss, take it to a thread about that topic or create that topic. Don't let this dissolve into another potpourri thread.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Mon Oct 22, 2012 1:37 pm My friend found this one . Not sure if this one is official or not. It's basically the original NicoNico trailer with the clips from the Santen commercial spliced in.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Oct 23, 2012 10:08 am Horse racing topic moved here: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/13234/Japanese-Racing-Association-campaign/ Please use the Search function or Threads feature, it's not that hard.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Oct 23, 2012 12:03 pm riffraff11235 : Looks like somebody went to the trouble of splicing the two videos together from what I can tell.

[]:             Quote Post by Hiten777 » Thu Oct 25, 2012 4:07 pm I just happened to see those last week and boy was I astounded. Speculation-wise, the relationship between Shinji and Kaworu will be addressed and it seems like Shinji is happy at first, but later in the trailer he shows signs of frustration. My guess - Kaworu tries to alleviate Shinji's problems by giving him a friend, but takes it to the next level and tries to get him to just forget everyone and let 3I happen, causing Shinji to see past him and reject him. Asuka and Mari are back in action and my guess is that they are working to stop Seele and will eventually meet and work together. Although, Mari seems to be the type that would tease Asuka while they are working. Rei is back, but from what's been shown in the trailer, she may either be Rei III or probably forgot what happened after the events of the last movie. My guess - if it's either, then Rei will eventually come to remember what happened and go to assists Shinji, how this is done is anyones guess though, perhaps Unit 08.

[]:             Quote Post by bladerj » Thu Oct 25, 2012 10:20 pm So it seems mari will continue to pilot officially, i wonder if she gets another eva for her, i hope so, that way i can display her with a new (hopefully release) RD eva.

[]:             Quote Post by ScottAsher » Thu Oct 25, 2012 11:07 pm Hiten777 wrote: I just happened to see those last week and boy was I astounded. Speculation-wise, the relationship between Shinji and Kaworu will be addressed and it seems like Shinji is happy at first, but later in the trailer he shows signs of frustration. My guess - Kaworu tries to alleviate Shinji's problems by giving him a friend, but takes it to the next level and tries to get him to just forget everyone and let 3I happen, causing Shinji to see past him and reject him. Asuka and Mari are back in action and my guess is that they are working to stop Seele and will eventually meet and work together. Although, Mari seems to be the type that would tease Asuka while they are working. Rei is back, but from what's been shown in the trailer, she may either be Rei III or probably forgot what happened after the events of the last movie. My guess - if it's either, then Rei will eventually come to remember what happened and go to assists Shinji, how this is done is anyones guess though, perhaps Unit 08.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Fri Oct 26, 2012 12:05 am ScottAsher wrote: I can imagine the phone scene being her yelling at Mari now, actually. "You're dumber than that idiot Shinji!"

[]:             Quote Post by Brainman » Fri Oct 26, 2012 12:44 am I kind of interoperate it as things are getting real and everyone's in a state of confusion. Unit 02 is getting prepped to be sent back to Europe for reconditioning (hence the makeshift parts) and something big is hitting them before it ships out. And she's yelling at whoever to get it ready. "No, god-dammit, I said get it ready for launch! I don't care what happens! JUST DO IT!"

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Fri Oct 26, 2012 7:12 am ^ this seems legit to me. Meanwhile Mari masturbates in EVA-08, notices an Angel and launches.

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Fri Oct 26, 2012 7:47 am Brainman wrote: "No, god-dammit, I said get it ready for launch! I don't care what happens! JUST DO IT!"

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Fri Oct 26, 2012 9:16 am "Mama Mama! They selected ME! I'm an elite pilot, about to protect mankind. The best in the world. It's a secret to everybody. But I'll only tell you, mama!" Okay, that's probably not what she's saying this time.

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Fri Oct 26, 2012 9:19 am Warren Peace wrote: "Mama Mama! They selected ME! I'm an elite pilot, about to protect mankind. The best in the world. It's a secret to everybody. But I'll only tell you, mama!"

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Fri Oct 26, 2012 9:22 am Not if the eyepatch represents a tribute to Twin Peaks , and Asuka has regressed to an earlier stage of life. You heard it here first!

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Fri Oct 26, 2012 9:33 am That would be something different.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Fri Oct 26, 2012 9:35 am Warren Peace wrote: Not if the eyepatch represents a tribute to Twin Peaks , and Asuka has regressed to an earlier stage of life. You heard it here first!

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Fri Oct 26, 2012 11:16 am robersora wrote: Meanwhile Mari masturbates in EVA-08, notices an Angel and launches.

[]:             Quote Post by driftking18594 » Fri Oct 26, 2012 11:19 am bladerj wrote: So it seems mari will continue to pilot officially, i wonder if she gets another eva for her, i hope so, that way i can display her with a new (hopefully release) RD eva.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Fri Oct 26, 2012 1:48 pm Indeed, Unit 7 is still unaccounted for is it not?

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Fri Oct 26, 2012 1:56 pm Jayfive wrote: Indeed, Unit 7 is still unaccounted for is it not?
